Recruit a variety of performers, each with distinct abilities and personalities, to strengthen your team.

## Gameplay Overview

Circus Electrique’s gameplay revolves around managing your circus troupe while navigating the challenges of Victorian London. Players will engage in tactical battles, make narrative choices, and balance the demands of running a successful circus. The game’s turn-based combat system requires strategic planning, as each performer’s abilities play a crucial role in overcoming enemies. With its blend of strategy, storytelling, and steampunk flair, Circus Electrique offers a unique and immersive gaming experience.

frontmatter.title: Circus Electrique
frontmatter.description: Step into the steampunk world of Circus Electrique, a unique blend of strategy RPG and circus management. Lead a troupe of performers, battle mechanical threats, and save Victorian London in this captivating adventure.

content:
Step into the shoes of a rising YouTube star in Youtubers Life 2, the ultimate social media simulator. This sequel expands on the original hit with deeper gameplay, new content, and endless creative possibilities.

Youtubers Life 2 drops you into a bustling city where fame and fortune await. Start as a small-time creator filming in your bedroom, then grow your channel into a global phenomenon. The game captures the thrill of viral content creation while blending life sim elements like friendships, rivalries, and city exploration. With multiple content genres to master and trending challenges to conquer, every playthrough feels unique.

## Key Features

### Expanded Content Creation
Film videos across 10+ genres including gaming, cooking, fashion and music. Upgrade your equipment and editing skills to produce higher-quality content.

### Dynamic Social Media
Watch your subscriber count grow as you react to trending topics. Engage with fans and fellow creators through an in-game social network.

### Living Open World
Explore a vibrant city filled with recording locations, shops, and NPCs. Discover hidden spots that make for perfect video backdrops.

### Character Customization
Design your avatar with hundreds of clothing options and accessories. Your style evolves as your channel grows more successful.

### RPG Progression System
Level up your creator skills across multiple attributes. Unlock new abilities that help you film better content faster.

### Realistic YouTube Simulation
Manage copyright claims, sponsor deals, and algorithm changes that mirror real platform challenges.

## Gameplay Overview

Youtubers Life 2 blends time management with creative decision-making. Each day presents opportunities to film content, edit videos, network with other creators, or explore the city for inspiration. The game's core loop revolves around planning recording sessions, optimizing your upload schedule, and analyzing performance metrics to grow your channel.

What sets Youtubers Life 2 apart is how it translates YouTube culture into engaging gameplay mechanics. You'll experience the rush of going viral, the pressure of maintaining consistency, and the satisfaction of building a loyal community. With multiple paths to success and endless content combinations, no two channels develop exactly alike.

frontmatter.title: Youtubers Life 2
frontmatter.description: Youtubers Life 2 is a life simulation RPG where you build your dream YouTube career. Record videos, gain followers, and explore a vibrant city in this addictive social media adventure.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3-2100 or AMD equivalent
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 570

content:
The Last Haven plunges players into a desolate world where survival is the only goal. As the leader of a dwindling group of survivors, you must navigate the challenges of a post-apocalyptic landscape, making critical decisions that will determine their fate.

The Last Haven combines base-building, resource management, and tactical combat in a hauntingly beautiful setting. Scavenge for supplies, fortify your haven, and face off against both human and environmental threats. Every choice matters as you strive to keep hope alive in a world on the brink of collapse.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Survival Systems
Manage hunger, fatigue, and morale as your survivors struggle to endure. Balance their needs with the demands of a harsh environment.

### Tactical Combat
Engage in turn-based battles against raiders and mutated creatures. Use strategy and clever positioning to outwit your foes.

### Base-Building Mechanics
Construct and upgrade your haven, from essential shelters to advanced defenses. Adapt your settlement to withstand the ever-changing threats.

### Branching Narrative
Make tough moral decisions that shape the story and impact your survivors’ future. Every choice has consequences.

### Resource Scavenging
Explore the ruins of civilization to gather vital supplies. Risk dangerous expeditions for the chance to secure rare materials.

## Gameplay Overview
In The Last Haven, players must balance survival, strategy, and storytelling. Start by establishing a safe haven, then expand and fortify it as you scavenge for resources. Assign tasks to survivors, manage their well-being, and prepare for inevitable threats.

The game’s tactical combat system adds depth, requiring players to plan their moves carefully. Meanwhile, the branching narrative ensures no two playthroughs are the same. With its mix of survival mechanics, strategic planning, and emotional storytelling, The Last Haven offers a uniquely immersive experience.

frontmatter.title: The Last Haven
frontmatter.description: The Last Haven is a gripping post-apocalyptic survival strategy game where players must lead a group of survivors, manage resources, and fend off threats in a world ravaged by catastrophe. Build, strategize, and survive!

content:
Growing Up is a narrative-driven life simulation game that lets players experience the ups and downs of growing up. From childhood to adulthood, every choice you make influences your character’s future in profound ways.

In Growing Up, you’ll step into the shoes of a young protagonist navigating the complexities of life. The game is set in a vibrant, evolving world where relationships, education, and personal growth take center stage. Your decisions—big or small—will shape your character’s personality, career, and relationships, creating a unique story every time you play.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Life Choices
Every decision you make, from friendships to career paths, has lasting consequences. Your choices influence the narrative and shape your character’s future.

### Emotional Storytelling
Growing Up delivers a deeply emotional experience, exploring themes of love, loss, ambition, and self-discovery. The story evolves based on your actions.

### Relationship Building
Forge meaningful connections with a diverse cast of characters. Your interactions determine the strength and nature of these relationships.

### Personal Growth
Develop your character’s skills, hobbies, and personality traits over time. Choose how they evolve and what defines them as they grow older.

### Immersive World
Explore a richly detailed world that changes as your character ages. Each stage of life offers new opportunities and challenges.

## Gameplay Overview

Growing Up combines life simulation with role-playing elements, allowing players to craft a unique story. You’ll manage your character’s time, balancing school, work, relationships, and personal interests. The game’s branching narrative ensures no two playthroughs are the same. With its focus on emotional depth and player-driven storytelling, Growing Up offers a reflective and engaging experience that resonates long after the game ends.

frontmatter.title: Growing Up
frontmatter.description: Growing Up is a heartfelt life simulation game where players shape their character’s journey from childhood to adulthood. Make impactful choices, build relationships, and navigate life’s challenges in this deeply emotional and immersive experience.

content:
Golden Record Retriever invites players to unravel the mysteries of the cosmos in a thrilling sci-fi adventure. Set in a vast universe filled with alien civilizations and ancient secrets, this game combines exploration, puzzle-solving, and storytelling into one unforgettable experience.

In Golden Record Retriever, you play as a space archaeologist tasked with recovering the Golden Record, a lost artifact containing humanity's greatest achievements. Travel to distant planets, decipher alien languages, and uncover clues that piece together the story of humanity's place in the universe. With its rich narrative and immersive world, this game offers a unique blend of discovery and challenge.

## Key Features

### Vast Alien Worlds
Explore diverse planets, each with unique ecosystems, cultures, and mysteries waiting to be uncovered.

### Puzzle-Driven Gameplay
Solve intricate puzzles that blend logic, linguistics, and creativity to progress through the story.

### Rich Narrative
Immerse yourself in a deep, branching storyline shaped by your choices and discoveries.

### Alien Encounters
Interact with alien species, learn their languages, and negotiate alliances or rivalries.

### Spacecraft Customization
Upgrade and personalize your spacecraft to traverse the galaxy more efficiently.

## Gameplay Overview
Golden Record Retriever combines exploration with puzzle-solving and narrative-driven gameplay. Players will navigate alien landscapes, decode ancient texts, and piece together the history of the Golden Record. The game emphasizes player choice, allowing you to shape the story through your actions and decisions. With its blend of adventure and intellectual challenge, Golden Record Retriever offers a truly unique sci-fi experience.

frontmatter.title: Golden Record Retriever
frontmatter.description: Embark on an interstellar journey in Golden Record Retriever, a sci-fi adventure game where you decode cosmic puzzles, explore alien worlds, and uncover humanity's lost legacy. Perfect for fans of exploration and narrative-driven gameplay.

content:
Step into the shoes of a medieval lord and craft a thriving village in Lords and Villeins. This strategy simulation game offers a unique blend of city-building and life simulation set in a dynamic sandbox world.

Lords and Villeins immerses you in a medieval setting where every decision shapes the lives of your villagers. Build homes, manage resources, and oversee trade routes while ensuring your village thrives. The game’s intricate social system allows you to influence relationships, marriages, and even rivalries among your villagers.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Village Life
Watch your villagers live, work, and interact in a bustling medieval community. Each villager has unique needs, skills, and personalities.

### Resource Management
Strategize resource allocation to ensure your village flourishes. Manage crops, livestock, and trade to maintain a balanced economy.

### Customizable Settlements
Design and expand your village with a variety of buildings and layouts. Tailor your settlement to fit your vision of a medieval utopia.

### Social Interactions
Shape the lives of your villagers by influencing their relationships, marriages, and alliances. Every decision impacts the village’s harmony.

### Sandbox Gameplay
Enjoy endless possibilities in a sandbox world. Experiment with different strategies and witness the evolving story of your village.

## Gameplay Overview

Lords and Villeins combines city-building with life simulation, offering a rich and immersive experience. Players manage resources, build structures, and oversee the daily lives of their villagers. The game’s social system adds depth, allowing you to influence relationships and community dynamics. Whether you’re optimizing trade routes or resolving conflicts, every choice shapes the future of your village. With its sandbox nature, Lords and Villeins encourages creativity and experimentation, making each playthrough unique.

frontmatter.title: Lords and Villeins
frontmatter.description: Lords and Villeins is a medieval strategy simulation game where you manage a thriving village. Build, trade, and shape the lives of your villagers in a dynamic sandbox world.

content:
Gladiator Guild Manager combines strategic depth with thrilling arena combat in a unique fantasy setting. Build your guild from the ground up and lead your warriors to glory.

In Gladiator Guild Manager, you take on the role of a guild master in a vibrant fantasy world. Your goal is to recruit, train, and manage a team of gladiators, each with unique abilities and personalities. Strategize your way through intense arena battles, manage resources, and outsmart rival guilds to rise to the top. The game blends tactical combat with deep management mechanics, offering endless replayability.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Gladiator Recruitment
Recruit a diverse roster of gladiators, each with unique skills, traits, and backstories. Balance their strengths and weaknesses to create the ultimate fighting force.

### Deep Tactical Combat
Engage in turn-based arena battles where positioning, timing, and strategy decide the outcome. Customize your gladiators' equipment and abilities to suit your playstyle.

### Guild Management
Manage your guild's finances, reputation, and facilities. Upgrade your training grounds, forge powerful weapons, and keep your gladiators happy to maintain their loyalty.

### Procedural Events
Experience a living world with dynamic events, rival guilds, and unexpected challenges. Every playthrough offers new opportunities and threats.

### Arena Tournaments
Compete in epic tournaments to earn fame and rewards. Climb the ranks and prove your guild is the best in the land.

## Gameplay Overview

Gladiator Guild Manager offers a mix of strategic planning and real-time decision-making. Between battles, you'll manage your guild, recruit new fighters, and upgrade your facilities. When the arena calls, you'll command your gladiators in tactical combat, using their unique abilities to outmaneuver opponents. The game's procedural elements ensure no two playthroughs are the same, keeping the experience fresh and engaging. Whether you prefer careful planning or bold strategies, Gladiator Guild Manager has something for every player.

frontmatter.title: Gladiator Guild Manager
frontmatter.description: Gladiator Guild Manager is a strategic simulation game where you build and manage a gladiator guild in a fantasy world. Recruit, train, and battle unique warriors to dominate the arena and become the ultimate guild master.

content:
Crab God is a captivating strategy simulation game where you take on the role of a divine protector of crabs, guiding their evolution and survival in the vast ocean.

Set in the mysterious depths of the sea, Crab God challenges you to build and manage a thriving crab civilization. As the Crab God, you’ll oversee their growth, protect them from predators, and ensure their survival in a dynamic underwater ecosystem. With a mix of resource management, strategic planning, and god-like powers, Crab God offers a unique twist on the simulation genre.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Ecosystem
Manage a living, breathing underwater world where every decision impacts the balance of the ecosystem.

### Crab Evolution
Guide your crabs through evolution, unlocking new abilities and traits to help them thrive.

### Divine Powers
Use god-like abilities to shape the ocean, summon resources, and protect your crabs from threats.

### Predator Defense
Fend off predators like octopuses and sharks while expanding your crab kingdom.

### Endless Ocean
Explore a procedurally generated ocean filled with unique challenges and opportunities.

## Gameplay Overview

In Crab God, players start with a small colony of crabs and must expand their territory by gathering resources, evolving their crabs, and defending against threats. The game combines elements of strategy, simulation, and god games, offering a rich and immersive experience. Players can customize their crabs’ traits, unlock powerful abilities, and explore the endless ocean to uncover secrets and challenges. With its unique setting and engaging mechanics, Crab God provides a fresh take on the simulation genre.

frontmatter.title: Crab God
frontmatter.description: In Crab God, dive into a deep-sea strategy simulation where you rule as the divine guardian of crabs. Build, evolve, and protect your crustacean kingdom in this unique god game set in the mysterious ocean depths.

content:
Step into the dangerous underworld of drug trafficking in *Drug Dealer Simulator 2*, the sequel to the hit crime simulation game. Build your empire from the streets to the top of the criminal food chain.

Set in a sprawling open-world city, *Drug Dealer Simulator 2* challenges you to manufacture, distribute, and sell illicit substances while avoiding law enforcement and rival gangs. With deeper mechanics and more ruthless AI, every decision could mean the difference between wealth and ruin.

## Key Features

### Expanded Criminal Empire
Grow your operation from a small-time dealer to a kingpin by managing production, distribution, and street-level sales across multiple territories.

### Dynamic Law Enforcement
Police and DEA agents use advanced AI to track your movements, forcing you to launder money, bribe officials, or go underground.

### Rival Gang Warfare
Compete with or eliminate other criminal organizations through sabotage, alliances, or outright violence in turf wars.

### Realistic Drug Crafting
Mix raw ingredients, perfect your recipes, and develop new strains to dominate the market with higher-quality products.

### Living Open World
Interact with NPCs with daily routines, respond to dynamic events, and exploit the city's economy to your advantage.

## Gameplay Overview

*Drug Dealer Simulator 2* blends strategy, resource management, and stealth in a high-risk criminal sandbox. Start by securing suppliers, then expand your network of dealers while balancing heat from authorities. The game introduces a reputation system where your actions affect how both criminals and civilians perceive you.

Players must launder money through legitimate businesses, invest in security, and adapt to market fluctuations. With multiple endings based on your choices, no two playthroughs are the same in this unforgiving criminal simulator.

frontmatter.title: Drug Dealer Simulator 2
frontmatter.description: Drug Dealer Simulator 2 is a gritty open-world crime sim where you build a narcotics empire. Expand your territory, evade the law, and outsmart rivals in this high-stakes underworld adventure.

minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 2GB / AMD Radeon R9 280

recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Welcome to Go-Go Town!, a delightful city-building simulation where creativity meets relaxation. Step into the shoes of a budding town manager and breathe life into a forgotten settlement. With a mix of resource management, customization, and exploration, Go-Go Town! offers a charming escape for players of all ages.

In Go-Go Town!, you’ll transform a sleepy, abandoned town into a thriving community. Build shops, attract residents, and customize every corner to reflect your unique vision. The game combines strategic planning with creative freedom, allowing you to craft a town that’s as vibrant and bustling as you desire. Whether you’re arranging buildings, managing resources, or interacting with quirky characters, Go-Go Town! promises endless hours of engaging fun.

## Key Features

### Build and Customize
Design and personalize your town with a variety of buildings, decorations, and layouts. Create a unique space that reflects your style.

### Resource Management
Gather resources, manage finances, and balance your town’s needs to keep your residents happy and your economy thriving.

### Quirky Characters
Meet and interact with a cast of charming characters who bring life and personality to your town. Each resident has their own story and preferences.

### Exploration
Discover hidden treasures, unlock new areas, and uncover secrets as you expand your town and its influence.

### Relaxing Gameplay
Enjoy a stress-free experience with intuitive mechanics and a soothing atmosphere, perfect for unwinding after a long day.

## Gameplay Overview

Go-Go Town! combines city-building with sandbox creativity, offering players the freedom to design and manage their dream town. Start by constructing essential buildings and gradually expand to include shops, parks, and more. Manage resources wisely to ensure your town grows efficiently, and keep your residents happy by meeting their needs.

As you progress, you’ll unlock new areas, discover hidden treasures, and interact with a variety of quirky characters who add depth to your town’s story. The game’s relaxed pace and intuitive controls make it accessible for both beginners and seasoned players. Whether you’re perfecting your town’s layout or exploring its secrets, Go-Go Town! delivers a rewarding and enjoyable experience.

frontmatter.title: Go-Go Town!
frontmatter.description: Go-Go Town! is a charming city-building simulation game where you revive a forgotten town into a bustling hub. Manage resources, attract residents, and customize your dream town in this relaxing sandbox adventure.

content:
Step into a world where farming is more than just planting crops—it’s a journey of discovery, strategy, and survival. *The Farmer Was Replaced* offers a unique blend of simulation and narrative-driven gameplay that will keep you hooked.

Welcome to Willowcreek, a quaint village with a dark secret. When the town’s beloved farmer mysteriously vanishes, you’re tasked with taking over the farm. But as you tend to your fields, you’ll uncover clues about the farmer’s disappearance and the strange occurrences in the area. Will you focus on restoring the farm to its former glory, or will you dig deeper into the mysteries surrounding Willowcreek?

## Key Features

### Dynamic Farming System
Grow a variety of crops, raise livestock, and manage resources in a realistic farming simulation. Adapt to changing seasons and weather conditions.

### Mystery-Driven Narrative
Uncover the truth behind the farmer’s disappearance through branching storylines and hidden clues scattered throughout the game world.

### Sandbox Exploration
Explore a vast open world filled with secrets, side quests, and unique characters. Every corner of Willowcreek has something to discover.

### Strategic Decisions
Make choices that impact the farm’s success and the town’s future. Balance your time between farming, exploring, and solving mysteries.

### Customizable Farm
Personalize your farm with decorations, upgrades, and layouts. Create a farm that reflects your style and strategy.

## Gameplay Overview

In *The Farmer Was Replaced*, you’ll start with a small, neglected farm and gradually expand it into a thriving agricultural hub. Plant crops, care for animals, and sell your produce to earn money for upgrades. But farming is just the beginning. As you explore Willowcreek, you’ll encounter puzzles, side quests, and characters with their own stories. The game’s narrative unfolds through your actions, with multiple endings based on your decisions. Whether you’re a fan of farming sims or story-driven games, *The Farmer Was Replaced* offers a fresh and engaging experience.

frontmatter.title: The Farmer Was Replaced
frontmatter.description: In *The Farmer Was Replaced*, step into a mysterious countryside where farming meets strategy and storytelling. Manage crops, uncover secrets, and decide your path in this immersive simulation game with a twist.

content:
Step into a world where every card tells a story of ruin and redemption. Mori Carta blends tactical deck-building with roguelike progression in a hand-painted gothic setting.

In Mori Carta, you play as a wandering Archivist, collecting the last remnants of a dying civilization—cursed relics, forgotten spells, and the souls of fallen warriors. Each playthrough unfolds differently as you assemble decks from these macabre treasures, facing ever-shifting threats in a land consumed by an ancient curse. The game's haunting art style and atmospheric soundtrack immerse you in its melancholic world.

## Key Features

### Cursed Deckbuilding
Forge your strategy from unstable relics and doomed heroes. Every card carries both power and peril, forcing players to balance risk and reward.

### Dynamic Encounter System
Each battle adapts to your playstyle, with enemies that learn from your tactics and environments that evolve mid-combat.

### Gothic Legacy System
Death is not the end. Fallen characters become new cards, creating an ever-expanding arsenal of tragic heroes and their abilities.

### Hand-Painted Horrors
Every creature and location is rendered in exquisite detail, bringing the game's dark fairytale aesthetic to life.

### Roguelike Campaign
Navigate a branching map of crumbling kingdoms, making narrative choices that permanently alter your deck and the world itself.

## Core Mechanics

Mori Carta combines traditional deck-building with innovative risk mechanics. Players draft cards from three distinct factions—the Hollow Court, the Ashen Order, and the Drowned Choir—each with unique synergies and playstyles. The game's signature 'Doom' system allows powerful plays at the cost of accelerating the enemy's strength, creating tense, chess-like matches. Between battles, players explore ruined landscapes, uncovering lore fragments that unlock new cards and reveal the world's tragic history. With permadeath ensuring no two runs play alike, Mori Carta rewards both careful planning and bold improvisation.

frontmatter.title: Mori Carta
frontmatter.description: Mori Carta is a dark fantasy card battler where players build decks from cursed relics and fallen heroes. Outwit eldritch horrors in tactical duels across a decaying world. Perfect for fans of strategic deck-builders with a gothic twist.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD FX-4350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 570

content:
Reus 2 is a divine strategy game where you wield the power of nature through colossal giants to shape a thriving world. As a benevolent (or mischievous) force, you'll cultivate ecosystems, nurture civilizations, and maintain the delicate balance between progress and preservation.

In Reus 2, you control four elemental giants—Earth, Water, Forest, and Mountain—each with unique abilities to terraform the land, create resources, and influence human settlements. The game expands upon the original's acclaimed formula with deeper simulation systems, dynamic civilizations, and new ways to interact with your world. Will you create a harmonious paradise or watch as greed and ambition reshape your creation?

## Key Features

### Elemental Giants
Command four distinct giants, each with specialized powers to mold the environment, summon resources, and trigger natural phenomena that shape the world.

### Dynamic Civilizations
Guide evolving human societies that grow, trade, wage wars, and make demands—your choices directly impact their development and the world's balance.

### Deep Ecosystem Simulation
Create interconnected biomes where every plant, animal, and resource affects the food chain, climate, and human civilizations in surprising ways.

### Divine Interventions
Unlock godly powers to bless or punish mortals, trigger natural disasters, or reshape entire landscapes as you see fit.

### Endless Replayability
Procedurally generated worlds and emergent gameplay ensure no two playthroughs are alike, with multiple victory conditions and playstyles.

## Gameplay Overview

Reus 2 combines god game mechanics with strategic resource management and emergent storytelling. Players carefully deploy their giants' abilities to create fertile lands while managing human civilizations that grow increasingly complex. The game introduces new systems like climate simulation, cultural evolution, and more intricate trade networks that create dynamic challenges.

Gameplay unfolds across distinct eras, with players deciding whether to maintain natural harmony or push civilizations toward technological advancement—each path offering unique rewards and consequences. The expanded diplomacy system allows for deeper interactions with human factions, while new natural disasters and celestial events keep every playthrough unpredictable and engaging.

frontmatter.title: Reus 2
frontmatter.description: Reus 2 is a god game where you control powerful giants to shape a vibrant world. Cultivate ecosystems, guide civilizations, and balance nature's might with humanity's ambition in this unique strategy sandbox experience.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD FX-4350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 550 Ti or AMD Radeon HD 6770

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 or AMD Radeon R9 280

content:
PC Tycoon 2 lets you step into the shoes of a tech mogul, building your PC empire from the ground up. From designing hardware to managing supply chains, every decision shapes your success in this immersive simulation game.

In PC Tycoon 2, you start as a small startup in a competitive tech market. Your goal is to grow your business by researching new technologies, optimizing production, and outmaneuvering rivals. The game combines deep strategy with accessible mechanics, making it perfect for both casual players and hardcore simulation fans.

## Key Features

### Hardware Design Studio
Create custom PCs with a vast array of components. Mix and match CPUs, GPUs, and other parts to build machines that meet market demands.

### Dynamic Market Economy
Compete in a living economy where prices fluctuate based on supply, demand, and competitor actions. Adapt your strategy to stay ahead.

### Research and Development
Invest in R&D to unlock advanced technologies. From faster processors to revolutionary cooling systems, innovation drives your success.

### Factory Management
Optimize your production lines for efficiency. Balance cost, quality, and speed to meet customer expectations and maximize profits.

### Global Expansion
Expand your business worldwide by opening new factories, stores, and offices. Each region offers unique challenges and opportunities.

## Gameplay Overview

PC Tycoon 2 blends strategic planning with hands-on management. You'll oversee every aspect of your business, from product design to marketing campaigns. The game offers a sandbox mode for creative freedom and a challenging campaign with specific goals. Whether you prefer micromanagement or big-picture strategy, PC Tycoon 2 delivers a rewarding experience. With realistic mechanics and endless possibilities, it's the ultimate PC business simulator.

frontmatter.title: PC Tycoon 2
frontmatter.description: PC Tycoon 2 is the ultimate business simulation game where you build and manage your dream PC empire. Design cutting-edge hardware, compete in the tech market, and dominate the industry with strategic decisions and innovation.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2500K or AMD equivalent
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 or AMD Radeon R9 280

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-6700K or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 or AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
In Bodycam, players step into the shoes of a security guard tasked with investigating a mysterious facility. Armed with only a body camera, players must survive the horrors lurking within.

Set in a sprawling, abandoned complex, Bodycam immerses players in a chilling atmosphere filled with suspense and terror. The game’s unique perspective, viewed entirely through the lens of a body camera, adds a layer of realism and tension. As players explore the facility, they’ll encounter grotesque creatures, solve intricate puzzles, and piece together the dark history of the site.

## Key Features

### Realistic Bodycam View
Experience the game through the lens of a body camera, with authentic visuals and immersive sound design that heightens the sense of dread.

### Dynamic Enemy AI
Face off against intelligent enemies that adapt to your actions, making each encounter unpredictable and terrifying.

### Puzzle-Driven Gameplay
Solve complex puzzles scattered throughout the facility to unlock new areas and uncover hidden secrets.

### Multiplayer Co-op
Team up with friends in online co-op mode to survive the horrors together, sharing resources and strategies.

### Atmospheric Setting
Explore a meticulously detailed environment filled with eerie lighting, haunting audio cues, and a sense of isolation.

## Gameplay Overview

Bodycam combines exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving in a seamless experience. Players must carefully manage their resources, such as batteries for the camera and limited ammunition, to survive. The game’s mechanics emphasize tension and strategy, requiring players to think on their feet and adapt to the evolving threats. Whether playing solo or with friends, Bodycam offers a heart-pounding journey through a world where every corner could hide unspeakable horrors.

frontmatter.title: Bodycam
frontmatter.description: Bodycam is an intense first-person survival horror game where players must navigate a dark, abandoned facility using only a body camera. Fight terrifying enemies, solve puzzles, and uncover the chilling secrets of the facility.

content:
Game Dev Story is a charming simulation game that puts you in charge of a fledgling game development studio. Your goal is to create hit games, manage your team, and grow your company into an industry leader.

In Game Dev Story, you start with a small team and limited resources, but through smart decisions and creative game development, you can rise to the top of the gaming industry. The game combines strategy, management, and a touch of nostalgia with its pixel-art style and retro gaming references.

## Key Features

### Studio Management
Build and expand your game development studio, hiring staff with different skills like programming, sound design, and writing to create the perfect team.

### Game Creation
Choose genres, themes, and platforms for your games, then watch as your team brings them to life with varying levels of quality and success.

### Research & Development
Invest in new technologies and training to improve your team's abilities and unlock more advanced game types.

### Industry Events
Participate in gaming conventions and awards shows to boost your company's reputation and attract better talent.

### Long-term Strategy
Balance budgets, manage employee morale, and make strategic decisions that will determine whether your studio thrives or fails.

## Gameplay Overview

Game Dev Story offers deep but accessible management gameplay where every decision matters. You'll need to carefully allocate resources, choose which games to develop, and manage your team's workload to succeed. The game features a satisfying progression system as you unlock new genres, platforms, and technologies over time.

With its addictive gameplay loop and charming presentation, Game Dev Story perfectly captures the challenges and rewards of running a game development company. Whether you're creating casual mobile games or next-gen console masterpieces, every playthrough offers new strategies to explore and challenges to overcome.

frontmatter.title: Game Dev Story
frontmatter.description: Game Dev Story is a captivating simulation game where you build and manage your own game development company. Create hit games, hire talented staff, and compete for awards in this pixel-art retro strategy experience.

content:
Welcome to Rail Route, a game that puts you in control of intricate railway networks. Whether you're a train enthusiast or a strategy lover, this game offers a unique blend of planning and execution.

Rail Route challenges you to create efficient railway systems in dynamic environments. From designing tracks to managing timetables, every decision impacts your success. With realistic mechanics and endless possibilities, Rail Route delivers an immersive simulation experience.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Railway Networks
Build and expand railway systems in procedurally generated cities. Adapt to changing demands and optimize your routes for maximum efficiency.

### Realistic Train Management
Control train schedules, manage cargo, and ensure punctuality. Balance passenger and freight needs while maintaining smooth operations.

### Challenging Scenarios
Face unique challenges like weather conditions, technical failures, and unexpected events. Test your problem-solving skills in realistic railway scenarios.

### Advanced Analytics
Monitor your network's performance with detailed statistics. Use data to refine your strategies and improve efficiency.

## Gameplay Overview

Rail Route combines strategy and simulation in a way that keeps players engaged for hours. Start by laying tracks and connecting stations, then manage train schedules and cargo distribution. The game's realistic mechanics require careful planning and quick thinking.

As you progress, unlock new technologies and expand your network. Each decision affects your railway's efficiency, so strategic thinking is key. Rail Route offers a rewarding experience for players who enjoy complex management games.

frontmatter.title: Rail Route
frontmatter.description: Rail Route is a captivating train management simulation game where you design and optimize railway networks. Build routes, manage schedules, and ensure smooth operations in this engaging strategy experience.

content:
SUMMERHOUSE is a tranquil sandbox experience that invites players to create picturesque miniature worlds. With its soothing gameplay and pixel-art aesthetic, it’s designed for anyone seeking a creative escape.

Set in a serene, dreamlike environment, SUMMERHOUSE lets you construct cozy houses, lush gardens, and quaint neighborhoods. The game encourages storytelling through its modular building system, where every structure and detail tells a story. Whether you’re crafting a sleepy village or a bustling seaside town, SUMMERHOUSE offers endless possibilities.

## Key Features

### Modular Building System
Build with ease using pre-designed modules, allowing you to quickly assemble houses, paths, and landscapes.

### Pixel-Art Aesthetic
Enjoy a charming visual style that blends nostalgia with modern design, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

### Relaxing Gameplay
Focus on creativity without pressure or time limits, making SUMMERHOUSE a perfect unwind after a long day.

### Dynamic Lighting
Watch your creations come to life with day-night cycles and subtle lighting effects that enhance the mood.

### Endless Possibilities
Combine elements in unique ways to craft personalized stories and scenes, ensuring no two builds are alike.

## Gameplay Overview

SUMMERHOUSE is all about creativity and relaxation. Players start with a blank canvas and gradually add houses, trees, and other elements to create their ideal world. The intuitive controls make it easy to experiment with layouts and designs. As you build, you’ll unlock new items and features, encouraging you to revisit and refine your creations. The game’s open-ended nature ensures that every session is uniquely rewarding, whether you’re building for minutes or hours.

frontmatter.title: SUMMERHOUSE
frontmatter.description: SUMMERHOUSE is a relaxing sandbox game where you build charming miniature houses and landscapes. Perfect for creative minds, it blends architecture, storytelling, and serene gameplay in a unique pixel-art style.

content:
Embark on a deeply personal journey in Iris and the Giant, where strategy meets emotional storytelling in a roguelike card game. Explore Iris's inner world as she confronts her fears and memories in this unique blend of fantasy and introspection.

In Iris and the Giant, you play as Iris, a young girl navigating her inner world filled with mythical creatures and personal demons. The game combines roguelike mechanics with card-based combat, creating a challenging yet rewarding experience. As you progress, you'll unlock new cards and abilities, each representing Iris's evolving emotions and strengths. The game's narrative unfolds through her encounters, offering a poignant exploration of mental health and self-discovery.

## Key Features

### Emotional Storytelling
Experience a heartfelt narrative that delves into themes of mental health, courage, and self-acceptance, making Iris and the Giant more than just a game.

### Card-Based Combat
Master a unique combat system where each card represents Iris's emotions and strategies, offering endless tactical possibilities.

### Roguelike Progression
Face procedurally generated challenges that ensure no two playthroughs are the same, keeping the gameplay fresh and engaging.

### Stunning Art Style
Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted world with hand-drawn visuals that bring Iris's inner journey to life.

### Strategic Depth
Plan your moves carefully, balancing offense, defense, and resource management to overcome increasingly difficult foes.

## Gameplay Overview

Iris and the Giant combines the strategic depth of card games with the unpredictability of roguelikes. Players must carefully choose their cards to navigate through Iris's inner world, battling fears and memories in turn-based combat. Each decision impacts Iris's journey, with permadeath ensuring every choice carries weight. The game encourages experimentation, allowing players to discover new strategies and card combinations. With its blend of emotional storytelling and challenging gameplay, Iris and the Giant offers a unique and memorable experience.

frontmatter.title: Iris and the Giant
frontmatter.description: Iris and the Giant is a captivating roguelike card game blending strategy and emotional storytelling. Guide Iris through her inner world as she battles fears and memories in a unique card-based combat system.

content:
Quilts and Cats of Calico is a charming puzzle-strategy game that combines creativity, strategy, and feline companionship. It’s a delightful experience for players who enjoy thoughtful gameplay and cozy aesthetics.

In Quilts and Cats of Calico, you step into the shoes of a quilt designer, crafting beautiful patterns to attract cats to your creations. Set in a quaint village, the game challenges you to balance aesthetics and strategy as you compete against others to create the most appealing quilts. With its relaxing atmosphere and clever mechanics, it’s a perfect blend of creativity and competition.

## Key Features

### Creative Quilting
Design unique quilts by placing fabric pieces strategically, ensuring patterns and colors align perfectly to maximize your score.

### Adorable Cats
Attract a variety of cats by meeting their specific preferences, adding a layer of charm and strategy to your quilt designs.

### Strategic Depth
Balance aesthetics, cat preferences, and bonus objectives to outscore your opponents in this engaging puzzle game.

### Multiplayer Mode
Compete against friends or AI in multiplayer matches, showcasing your quilting skills and creativity.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Enjoy a cozy, stress-free environment with soothing visuals and calming music, perfect for unwinding.

## Gameplay Overview
In Quilts and Cats of Calico, players take turns selecting fabric pieces to add to their quilts. Each piece must be placed carefully to form cohesive patterns and attract cats, which award bonus points. The game combines tile-placement mechanics with strategic planning, as players aim to fulfill specific objectives while keeping an eye on their opponents’ progress. Whether playing solo or with friends, Quilts and Cats of Calico offers a unique blend of creativity and competition that’s both relaxing and rewarding.

frontmatter.title: Quilts and Cats of Calico
frontmatter.description: Quilts and Cats of Calico is a cozy puzzle-strategy game where players design quilts, attract adorable cats, and compete for the most creative designs. Perfect for fans of relaxing, thoughtful gameplay.

content:
100% Orange Juice blends board game mechanics with RPG elements in a vibrant anime-inspired world. Players take on the role of characters from the Orange Juice universe, rolling dice to move across the board and engaging in strategic battles.

In 100% Orange Juice, players compete to complete missions, collect stars, and outwit opponents in a fast-paced, multiplayer-focused experience. The game’s charming art style and quirky humor make it a standout in the indie gaming scene. Whether you're teaming up or facing off, every match is filled with surprises.

## Key Features

### Anime-Style Characters
Play as a variety of characters from the Orange Juice universe, each with unique abilities and personalities that influence gameplay.

### Strategic Board Gameplay
Roll dice, move across the board, and use cards to gain advantages or hinder opponents in this competitive yet lighthearted experience.

### Multiplayer Madness
Challenge friends or strangers in online multiplayer matches, where every roll of the dice can change the course of the game.

### Mission-Based Goals
Complete missions to earn stars and become the ultimate victor, blending strategy and luck for a dynamic experience.

### Quirky Humor
Enjoy a lighthearted tone filled with jokes, references, and charming interactions between characters.

## Gameplay Overview
100% Orange Juice combines traditional board game mechanics with RPG elements, creating a unique blend of strategy and chance. Players roll dice to move across the board, encounter events, and battle opponents using a card-based combat system. The goal is to collect stars by completing missions, but beware—other players can steal your stars or knock you back. With its fast-paced matches and unpredictable outcomes, 100% Orange Juice offers endless fun for fans of board games and anime alike.

frontmatter.title: 100% Orange Juice
frontmatter.description: 100% Orange Juice is a unique anime-style board game RPG where players roll dice, battle opponents, and complete missions. Dive into a charming world of strategy and chaos in this multiplayer-focused adventure.

content:
Embark on a frosty adventure in United Penguin Kingdom, where strategy meets survival in the icy Antarctic. This simulation game challenges you to build and manage a thriving penguin colony while exploring a vast, snowy world.

In United Penguin Kingdom, you take on the role of a penguin leader tasked with guiding your colony to prosperity. From constructing igloos to managing resources, every decision impacts your penguins' survival. Explore the frozen tundra, encounter wildlife, and uncover hidden secrets in this engaging sandbox experience.

## Key Features

### Colony Management
Build and expand your penguin colony by constructing structures, managing resources, and ensuring the happiness of your flock.

### Exploration
Discover a vast open world filled with icy landscapes, hidden caves, and unique wildlife to encounter.

### Survival Challenges
Face harsh weather conditions, predators, and resource scarcity as you strive to keep your colony thriving.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends or compete against other players in cooperative or competitive multiplayer modes.

### Customization
Personalize your penguin leader and colony with unique skins, decorations, and more.

## Gameplay Overview
United Penguin Kingdom combines strategy and simulation elements to create a unique gameplay experience. Players start with a small colony and gradually expand by gathering resources, constructing buildings, and exploring the environment. The game emphasizes decision-making, as every choice affects the colony's growth and survival. Whether you're managing resources, fending off predators, or exploring the vast Antarctic, United Penguin Kingdom offers endless hours of fun and challenge.

frontmatter.title: United Penguin Kingdom
frontmatter.description: United Penguin Kingdom is a charming strategy simulation game where players build and manage a thriving penguin empire in the icy Antarctic. Lead your colony, explore vast landscapes, and ensure survival in this family-friendly adventure.

content:
In a world where goblins are the underdogs, *Goblin Stone* flips the script, putting you in charge of a ragtag tribe fighting for survival. This turn-based roguelike blends strategic combat with dark humor and stunning hand-drawn visuals.

Goblin Stone invites you to rewrite goblin history. Humanity has pushed your kind to the brink, and it's time to fight back. Assemble a motley crew of goblins, each with unique traits and quirks, as you explore procedurally generated dungeons filled with danger and dark secrets. The game's narrative-driven campaign unfolds through your choices, with permadeath adding weight to every decision.

## Key Features

### Hand-Drawn Fantasy World
Immerse yourself in a beautifully illustrated dark fantasy realm where every environment tells a story of goblin oppression and rebellion.

### Roguelike Tribe Management
Build and maintain your goblin tribe, balancing resources and relationships as you recruit new members with randomized traits and abilities.

### Tactical Turn-Based Combat
Engage in strategic battles using a unique action-point system that rewards clever positioning and skill combinations.

### Procedural Storytelling
Experience a narrative that adapts to your choices, with multiple endings based on your tribe's survival and decisions.

### Permadeath with Legacy
When goblins fall, their legacy lives on through inherited traits and unlocked bonuses for future generations of your tribe.

### Dark Humor Tone
Enjoy a story filled with grim comedy, where even the most desperate situations have a twisted goblin perspective.

## Gameplay Overview

Goblin Stone combines turn-based tactical combat with roguelike progression. Each run begins with a small group of goblins that you'll guide through dangerous territories, managing their health, morale, and special abilities. The combat system emphasizes positioning and synergies between different goblin classes, from sneaky stabbers to mad alchemists.

Between expeditions, you'll manage your growing tribe at the warren, making tough choices about resource allocation and goblin relationships. The game's signature permadeath mechanic means every loss is permanent, but successful runs unlock new mutations and bonuses for future tribes. With multiple difficulty levels and endless replayability, Goblin Stone offers a fresh challenge each time you play.

frontmatter.title: Goblin Stone
frontmatter.description: Goblin Stone is a unique turn-based roguelike adventure where you lead a band of misfit goblins against humanity. Build your tribe, explore hand-drawn dungeons, and survive in a world that hates you.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD FX-4350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 570

content:
In *The Tribe Must Survive*, players step into the role of a tribal leader tasked with guiding a group of survivors through a perilous prehistoric world. Every decision counts as you balance resource management, tribal morale, and the ever-present threat of extinction.

Set in a beautifully crafted yet unforgiving landscape, the game challenges you to adapt to changing seasons, hunt for food, and fend off predators. The fate of your tribe hinges on your ability to strategize, innovate, and make morally complex choices.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Tribal Management
Manage your tribe’s needs, from food and shelter to health and happiness. Each member has unique skills and personalities that impact survival.

### Procedural Storylines
Experience a unique narrative shaped by your decisions. Every playthrough offers new challenges and outcomes based on your choices.

### Harsh Survival Mechanics
Navigate extreme weather, dwindling resources, and dangerous wildlife. Adapt your strategies to survive in an ever-changing environment.

### Deep Crafting System
Craft tools, weapons, and shelters from scavenged materials. Upgrade your tribe’s capabilities to withstand greater threats.

### Moral Dilemmas
Face tough decisions that test your ethics. Will you sacrifice one to save many, or risk everything for the greater good?

## Gameplay Overview

The Tribe Must Survive combines survival mechanics with strategic decision-making. Players must gather resources, assign tasks, and explore the world to uncover new opportunities. The game emphasizes adaptability, as each season brings new challenges and threats. With a focus on storytelling, every choice you make influences the tribe’s fate, creating a deeply immersive and replayable experience.

frontmatter.title: The Tribe Must Survive
frontmatter.description: The Tribe Must Survive is a gripping survival strategy game where players lead a prehistoric tribe through harsh environments. Manage resources, make tough decisions, and ensure your tribe's survival in this immersive experience.

content:
Paper Trail is a unique puzzle-adventure game that combines creative mechanics with a touching narrative. Players step into a world crafted entirely from paper, where every fold and twist brings new possibilities. 

Set in a serene, hand-drawn environment, Paper Trail invites you to guide a young protagonist on a journey of self-discovery. As you traverse through villages, forests, and mysterious landscapes, you’ll encounter puzzles that require you to fold the environment itself, blending logic and artistry to progress. The game’s narrative unfolds delicately, weaving themes of family, growth, and independence into its gameplay.

## Key Features

### Paper-Folding Mechanics
Master the art of folding paper to solve intricate puzzles, transforming the game world with every crease and fold.

### Hand-Drawn Visuals
Immerse yourself in a stunning, hand-drawn art style that brings the paper-crafted world to life with warmth and charm.

### Emotional Storyline
Experience a heartfelt narrative that explores themes of independence, family, and personal growth, resonating with players of all ages.

### Dynamic Puzzles
Engage with puzzles that adapt to your actions, offering a fresh and rewarding challenge with each solution.

### Serene Soundtrack
Relax to a soothing, original soundtrack that complements the game’s tranquil atmosphere and emotional depth.

## Gameplay Overview
In Paper Trail, players navigate a series of interconnected puzzles by folding and manipulating the environment. Each puzzle requires creative thinking and spatial awareness, as you fold sections of the world to create paths, uncover hidden objects, or reveal new areas. The game’s intuitive controls make it accessible, while its increasingly complex challenges keep players engaged. With its blend of innovative mechanics, beautiful visuals, and a touching story, Paper Trail offers a truly unique gaming experience that stays with you long after the final fold.

frontmatter.title: Paper Trail
frontmatter.description: Paper Trail is a captivating puzzle-adventure game where you fold and manipulate paper to solve intricate challenges. Explore a beautifully hand-drawn world and uncover a heartfelt story.

content:
In Dream Engines: Nomad Cities, you’ll experience a unique blend of survival, city-building, and steampunk aesthetics. Set in a world plagued by nightmares, this game challenges you to build and manage flying cities to survive against relentless horrors.

Welcome to a dystopian world where humanity’s last hope lies in the skies. Dream Engines: Nomad Cities combines the thrill of survival with the creativity of city-building. As the architect of a flying metropolis, you’ll gather resources, craft defenses, and navigate a hauntingly beautiful landscape filled with dangers and mysteries.

## Key Features

### Flying Cities
Build and manage floating cities that soar above the nightmare-infested world. Strategize your city’s layout to maximize efficiency and survival.

### Resource Management
Scavenge resources from the ground below while balancing the needs of your city’s inhabitants. Every decision impacts your chances of survival.

### Nightmare Defense
Defend your city against relentless nightmare creatures. Craft traps, weapons, and fortifications to keep the horrors at bay.

### Steampunk Aesthetics
Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted steampunk world filled with intricate machinery, floating islands, and a haunting atmosphere.

### Dynamic Exploration
Explore a procedurally generated world filled with secrets, dangers, and opportunities. Each journey offers new challenges and rewards.

## Gameplay Overview

Dream Engines: Nomad Cities blends survival strategy with city-building mechanics. Start by gathering resources and constructing your flying city, ensuring it’s equipped to handle the challenges ahead. As night falls, nightmares emerge, forcing you to defend your city with clever tactics and upgrades. The game’s procedurally generated world ensures no two playthroughs are the same, offering endless replayability. Whether you’re strategizing resource management or battling horrors, Dream Engines: Nomad Cities delivers a uniquely engaging experience.

frontmatter.title: Dream Engines: Nomad Cities
frontmatter.description: Dream Engines: Nomad Cities is a steampunk survival city-builder where you craft flying cities to escape relentless nightmares. Manage resources, defend against horrors, and explore a hauntingly beautiful world.

minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R9 270

recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
In **Sweet Transit**, you’re the mastermind behind a thriving network of railways and towns. This unique blend of city-building and transportation strategy challenges you to create seamless connections between settlements, ensuring prosperity for all.

Set in a whimsical, low-poly world, **Sweet Transit** puts you in charge of designing and managing rail systems to transport goods, resources, and passengers. Your decisions shape the landscape as villages grow into bustling cities, all fueled by your logistical prowess. With a focus on creativity and efficiency, this game offers a fresh take on the genre.

## Key Features

### Rail Network Mastery
Design intricate rail systems with switches, signals, and junctions to keep trains running smoothly. Every track placement matters as you balance speed and efficiency.

### Dynamic Town Growth
Watch as small villages evolve into thriving cities, demanding more resources and better infrastructure. Your rail network is the lifeline of their expansion.

### Resource Management
Harvest and transport essential goods like wood, coal, and food to keep your towns happy and productive. Logistics are key to success.

### Sandbox Freedom
Play at your own pace in a stress-free sandbox mode or tackle challenging scenarios that test your planning and problem-solving skills.

### Charming Aesthetic
Enjoy a cozy, low-poly art style that brings your railway empire to life with vibrant colors and delightful animations.

## Gameplay Overview

**Sweet Transit** combines the strategic depth of transportation games with the creative freedom of city builders. Lay tracks, manage resources, and optimize routes to ensure your towns flourish. The game’s intuitive mechanics make it easy to learn but hard to master, offering endless replayability. Whether you prefer relaxed building or complex logistics, **Sweet Transit** delivers a uniquely satisfying experience.

frontmatter.title: Sweet Transit
frontmatter.description: Sweet Transit is a charming transportation and city-building sim where you design efficient rail networks to connect growing towns. Build, optimize, and watch your empire thrive!

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD FX-8350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7870

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 or AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Battle Bands: Rock & Roll Deckbuilder turns musical warfare into strategic cardplay. Assemble your dream band, collect powerful cards, and rock your way to victory in this fresh take on deckbuilding roguelikes.

In Battle Bands, you lead a ragtag group of musicians battling for fame in a world where music is magic. Each show becomes a tactical showdown as you play cards representing riffs, solos, and stage effects to out-perform rival bands. The game combines deep deckbuilding mechanics with the energy of a live concert, creating a rhythm-infused strategy experience unlike any other.

## Key Features

### Musical Deckbuilding
Build your perfect setlist from hundreds of cards representing different musical styles, from face-melting metal riffs to soulful blues licks. Each card plays a unique role in your band's strategy.

### Band Member Customization
Recruit and upgrade band members with distinct abilities and personalities. Your lead guitarist plays differently than your drummer, requiring smart team synergy.

### Dynamic Stage Battles
Every concert is a tactical showdown where positioning, timing, and card combos matter. Watch your cards come to life as animated performances on stage.

### Roguelike Tour Mode
Embark on a tour across randomly generated cities, facing unique challenges and opportunities at each venue. No two playthroughs are the same.

### Killer Soundtrack
Original rock/metal soundtrack dynamically reacts to your gameplay, intensifying during critical moments and boss battles.

## Gameplay Overview

At its core, Battle Bands: Rock & Roll Deckbuilder combines traditional deckbuilding mechanics with innovative musical elements. Each turn, you'll play cards from your hand to attack opponents, buff your band, or disrupt enemy performances. Cards can be combined for devastating combos, and smart resource management is key to maintaining your band's stamina throughout longer sets.

The game features both short arena-style battles and longer campaign modes where you'll upgrade your equipment, discover rare cards, and face increasingly tough competitors. With multiple difficulty levels and endless card combinations, Battle Bands offers deep replayability for strategy fans and music lovers alike.

frontmatter.title: Battle Bands: Rock & Roll Deckbuilder
frontmatter.description: Battle Bands: Rock & Roll Deckbuilder is a unique fusion of deckbuilding strategy and rhythm-infused combat. Build your ultimate band, craft killer setlists, and dominate the stage in this high-energy roguelike adventure.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD FX-4350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-3470 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 570

content:
Step into a world where darkness reigns and every choice carries weight. Grim Realms invites you to a land teetering on the brink of oblivion, where ancient evils stir and humanity clings to survival.

In Grim Realms, you play as a lone wanderer drawn into a web of cosmic horrors and political strife. The game's sprawling open world is filled with decaying cities, haunted forests, and forgotten ruins, each hiding secrets and dangers. Your decisions shape the fate of the realm, with branching narratives and multiple endings ensuring no two playthroughs are alike.

## Key Features

### Dark Fantasy Setting
Immerse yourself in a meticulously crafted world inspired by gothic horror and eldritch mythology. Every location tells a story, from the cursed capital to the whispering catacombs beneath.

### Dynamic Combat System
Engage in visceral real-time combat with a mix of melee, ranged, and arcane abilities. Dodge, parry, and exploit enemy weaknesses to survive against towering monstrosities.

### Morality and Consequences
Your choices matter, affecting factions, NPC relationships, and the world itself. Will you be a beacon of hope or embrace the darkness for power?

### Deep Character Progression
Customize your hero with hundreds of skills, spells, and equipment options. Experiment with builds to suit your playstyle, from stealthy assassins to spell-slinging sorcerers.

### Living World
NPCs have their own schedules, agendas, and reactions to your actions. Witness the world change dynamically based on your decisions and the passage of time.

## Gameplay Overview

Grim Realms blends open-world exploration with intense combat and deep role-playing mechanics. Players can tackle quests in any order, uncovering the main story or getting lost in side content. The game emphasizes player agency, allowing you to approach challenges with stealth, diplomacy, or brute force. Survival elements like managing resources and enduring the harsh environment add another layer of immersion. Whether you're deciphering ancient texts, bargaining with demons, or facing off against nightmare creatures, Grim Realms offers a relentlessly engaging experience.

frontmatter.title: Grim Realms
frontmatter.description: Grim Realms is a dark fantasy RPG where players explore a cursed land, battling eldritch horrors and making morally gray choices. Unravel secrets in a richly detailed open world filled with danger and intrigue.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-4460 or AMD FX-8350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 760 or AMD Radeon R7 260x

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-8700K or AMD Ryzen 5 3600X
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1070 or AMD RX Vega 56

content:
Step into the shoes of an entrepreneur in *Internet Cafe Evolution*, where you’ll turn a humble internet cafe into a thriving digital empire. Balance budgets, upgrade tech, and keep customers happy in this immersive management sim.

Set in a vibrant, ever-changing digital world, *Internet Cafe Evolution* challenges you to adapt to trends, from early dial-up days to cutting-edge VR lounges. Outsmart competitors, customize your space, and become the ultimate cybercafe tycoon in this addictive strategy game.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Business Simulation
Manage every aspect of your cafe, from pricing and staff to decor and tech upgrades. Watch as your decisions directly impact customer satisfaction and profits.

### Tech Tree Progression
Unlock new hardware, software, and services across decades of tech evolution. Start with bulky CRT monitors and evolve to sleek gaming rigs and VR stations.

### Customer Personalities
Serve diverse patrons with unique needs, from casual surfers to competitive esports teams. Keep them happy to earn loyalty bonuses and word-of-mouth marketing.

### Random Events
Handle unexpected challenges like hardware failures, hacker attacks, or viral social media trends that can make or break your business overnight.

### Customizable Spaces
Design your ideal cafe layout with modular furniture, themed decor, and strategic workstation placement to maximize efficiency and aesthetic appeal.

## Gameplay Overview

*Internet Cafe Evolution* blends classic tycoon mechanics with fresh simulation elements. Each playthrough offers new challenges as you juggle limited resources against growing demand. Start small with a few PCs, then expand into food service, gaming tournaments, and premium memberships.

The game’s real charm lies in its attention to detail—watch customers react to your choices, optimize peak-hour workflows, and ride the wave of technological progress. With multiple victory conditions and endless customization, no two cafes evolve the same way.

frontmatter.title: Internet Cafe Evolution
frontmatter.description: Internet Cafe Evolution is a captivating business simulation game where you build and manage your own cybercafe empire. Expand your services, attract customers, and evolve from a small startup to a high-tech hub in this addictive tycoon-style adventure.

content:
Baldi's Basics Plus is a quirky yet terrifying survival game that combines humor, horror, and education in a surreal school setting.

In Baldi's Basics Plus, you play as a student trapped in a bizarre school filled with strange characters and unexpected challenges. Your goal is to collect notebooks by solving math problems while avoiding the relentless pursuit of Baldi, the strict math teacher. Along the way, you'll encounter other eccentric characters like the Principal and It's a Bully, each adding to the chaotic atmosphere. The game's retro graphics and unsettling soundtrack create a unique blend of nostalgia and dread.

## Key Features

### Retro Aesthetic
Baldi's Basics Plus features intentionally simplistic, old-school graphics that evoke a sense of nostalgia while enhancing the game's eerie atmosphere.

### Unique Characters
Meet a cast of unforgettable characters, each with their own quirks and behaviors, adding layers of challenge and humor to your survival experience.

### Procedurally Generated Levels
Every playthrough is different, thanks to procedurally generated school layouts, ensuring a fresh and unpredictable experience each time.

### Educational Twist
Solve math problems to collect notebooks, but be quick—Baldi gets faster and angrier with every mistake you make.

### Survival Mechanics
Use items strategically to evade Baldi and other characters, balancing resource management with quick thinking.

## Gameplay Overview
Baldi's Basics Plus challenges players to navigate a procedurally generated school, collect notebooks, and solve math problems to escape. However, Baldi becomes increasingly aggressive as you progress, forcing you to think on your feet. You’ll need to use items like energy drinks and scissors to outsmart him and other characters. The game’s blend of humor, horror, and educational elements creates a uniquely engaging experience that keeps players coming back for more.

frontmatter.title: Baldi's Basics Plus
frontmatter.description: Baldi's Basics Plus is a surreal horror-comedy survival game where you explore a creepy school, solve math problems, and escape Baldi's wrath. A unique blend of humor and tension awaits!

content:
Chrono Ark combines roguelike mechanics with deck-building strategy in a richly detailed fantasy setting. Players must assemble a team, manage their cards, and navigate a collapsing world filled with danger and mystery.

In Chrono Ark, you take on the role of a leader guiding a team of unique characters through a world on the brink of destruction. The game blends tactical combat with narrative depth, offering a compelling mix of strategy and storytelling. Each decision shapes your journey, and the ever-changing challenges keep every playthrough fresh.

## Key Features

### Strategic Deck-Building
Build and refine your deck to suit your playstyle, combining powerful cards to overcome increasingly tough challenges.

### Dynamic Team Management
Recruit and manage a diverse team of characters, each with unique abilities and synergies to master.

### Procedurally Generated Worlds
Explore a world that changes with every playthrough, ensuring no two adventures are the same.

### Engaging Narrative
Unravel a deep and mysterious story as you progress, with choices that impact the outcome of your journey.

### Challenging Combat
Face off against formidable enemies in tactical battles that require careful planning and execution.

## Gameplay Overview
Chrono Ark offers a blend of roguelike exploration and deck-building strategy. Players must carefully manage their resources, adapt to procedurally generated challenges, and make strategic decisions to survive. The game’s combat system is turn-based, requiring players to think ahead and utilize their cards effectively. With its rich narrative and replayable mechanics, Chrono Ark delivers a unique and immersive experience for fans of strategy and RPGs.

frontmatter.title: Chrono Ark
frontmatter.description: Chrono Ark is a thrilling roguelike deck-building RPG where you assemble a team, manage cards, and unravel a mysterious story in a collapsing world. Perfect for strategy fans!

content:
Step into the shoes of an industrial pioneer in FOUNDRY, a game that challenges your engineering creativity and problem-solving skills.

In FOUNDRY, you'll transform a barren landscape into a thriving industrial complex. Starting with basic tools, you'll extract raw materials, research advanced technologies, and design increasingly complex production chains. The game's voxel-based world offers complete freedom to reshape terrain and build vertically as you optimize your factory's layout and throughput.

## What Makes FOUNDRY Special

### Voxel-Based World Manipulation
Every block in FOUNDRY's world can be mined, placed, or modified, allowing for truly custom factory designs that adapt to the terrain or completely reshape it.

### Deep Automation Systems
Create elaborate production lines with conveyor belts, sorters, and assemblers that transform raw ores into high-tech components through multiple processing stages.

### Research Progression
Unlock new technologies through a branching research tree that gradually introduces more advanced machinery and production methods to expand your industrial empire.

### Logistics Challenges
Balance resource extraction, power generation, and transportation systems as your factory grows from simple workshops to sprawling industrial complexes.

### Creative Problem Solving
Each production challenge has multiple solutions, encouraging experimentation with different layouts and manufacturing approaches.

## Core Gameplay Mechanics

FOUNDRY combines elements of factory management, resource gathering, and logistics puzzles into a cohesive sandbox experience. Players begin with basic mining tools and simple workshops, gradually unlocking conveyor systems, automated miners, and advanced manufacturing through research. The game emphasizes emergent complexity as small production chains evolve into elaborate networks requiring careful planning and optimization.

Key gameplay revolves around identifying bottlenecks, expanding resource operations, and designing efficient layouts. Unlike similar games, FOUNDRY introduces unique challenges through its fully destructible voxel environment, allowing players to literally reshape the world to suit their industrial needs. The game scales from humble beginnings to massive operations where every decision impacts your factory's productivity.

frontmatter.title: FOUNDRY
frontmatter.description: FOUNDRY is a voxel-based automation sandbox game where you design and optimize intricate factory systems. Mine resources, research tech, and build sprawling production lines in this addictively deep simulation experience.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-3570K or AMD FX-8310
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 780 or AMD Radeon RX 470

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-4790 or AMD Ryzen 5 1600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Ocean Punk merges the thrill of cyberpunk with the mystery of the deep sea. In this action-packed RPG, you'll navigate a sprawling underwater city teeming with life, danger, and intrigue.

Set in the year 2187, Ocean Punk plunges you into the depths of Neo Atlantis, a submerged megacity where corporations rule and rebels fight for survival. As a freelance diver-for-hire, you'll take on missions, customize your gear, and uncover the dark secrets lurking beneath the waves. The game blends fast-paced combat, deep exploration, and a gripping narrative in a world unlike any other.

## Key Features

### Neon-Drenched Underwater World
Explore a vast open world filled with bioluminescent coral reefs, crumbling ruins, and high-tech cityscapes. Every corner of Neo Atlantis tells a story.

### Cybernetic Upgrades
Enhance your diver with cutting-edge implants and gear. Boost your speed, strength, or hacking abilities to suit your playstyle.

### Dynamic Combat System
Engage in fluid melee and ranged combat against rival divers, mutated sea creatures, and corporate enforcers. Use the environment to your advantage.

### Deep Sea Mysteries
Uncover hidden lore, lost treasures, and conspiracy theories as you dive deeper into the city's darkest corners.

### Faction Reputation System
Align with rebels, corporations, or mercenaries. Your choices shape the world and unlock unique missions and rewards.

## Gameplay Overview

Ocean Punk combines exploration, combat, and RPG elements in a seamless underwater experience. Swim freely through the city, using your gear to navigate obstacles and discover secrets. The game's physics-based movement makes every dive feel weightless and exhilarating. Customize your loadout to tackle challenges your way, whether through stealth, brute force, or hacking. With a branching narrative and multiple endings, your decisions have lasting consequences in this immersive cyberpunk odyssey.

frontmatter.title: Ocean Punk
frontmatter.description: Dive into Ocean Punk, an open-world action RPG set in a neon-lit underwater metropolis. Explore, fight, and uncover secrets in a dystopian future where the ocean is your playground.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-4460 or AMD FX-8350

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-9700K or AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA RTX 2070 or AMD RX 5700 XT

content:
Sixty Four is a deceptively simple puzzle game that will test your ability to think in patterns and perfect your spatial awareness. With its clean aesthetic and soothing soundtrack, it offers a refreshing take on the classic block-arrangement genre.

In Sixty Four, your goal is to manipulate falling blocks to create complete 8x8 grids (hence the name). The game starts gently but gradually introduces more complex shapes and restrictions that will push your problem-solving skills to their limits. What begins as a relaxing diversion soon becomes an addictive challenge as you chase higher scores and more elegant solutions.

## Key Features

### Minimalist Design
Sixty Four features a clean, distraction-free interface that keeps the focus squarely on the puzzle at hand. The monochromatic color scheme and smooth animations create a zen-like atmosphere.

### Progressive Difficulty
The game starts with simple squares but gradually introduces more complex polyomino pieces that require careful planning and rotation to fit into your growing grid.

### Endless Variations
With procedurally generated pieces and multiple game modes, Sixty Four offers near-infinite replayability. No two sessions play out exactly the same way.

### Soothing Soundscape
The ambient electronic soundtrack dynamically responds to your actions, creating a calming yet engaging audio experience that enhances your focus.

### Global Leaderboards
Compete against players worldwide to see who can create the most grids or achieve the highest efficiency scores in different game modes.

## Gameplay Overview

At its core, Sixty Four is about spatial reasoning and pattern recognition. Pieces fall from the top of the screen, and you must rotate and position them to form complete 8x8 squares. Each completed grid clears from your play area, making room for more pieces. The challenge comes from managing limited space while anticipating future pieces.
